'''鈭歬-p-g''' ('''kakapag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeopardise|jeopardise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeopardise|jeopardise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-p-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakapag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapag|thikapag]] || [[word:jikapag|jikapag]] || [[word:shikapag|shikapag]] || [[word:kikapag|kikapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapag|thuthukapag]] || [[word:jujukapag|jujukapag]] || [[word:shushukapag|shushukapag]] || [[word:kukukapag|kukukapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapag|thukapag]] || [[word:jukapag|jukapag]] || [[word:shukapag|shukapag]] || [[word:kukapag|kukapag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapag|thukapag]] || [[word:jukapag|jukapag]] || [[word:shukapag|shukapag]] || [[word:kukapag|kukapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekapag|thekapag]] || [[word:jekapag|jekapag]] || [[word:shekapag|shekapag]] || [[word:kekapag|kekapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapag|thothokapag]] || [[word:jojokapag|jojokapag]] || [[word:shoshokapag|shoshokapag]] || [[word:kokokapag|kokokapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapag|thokapag]] || [[word:jokapag|jokapag]] || [[word:shokapag|shokapag]] || [[word:kokapag|kokapag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapag|thokapag]] || [[word:jokapag|jokapag]] || [[word:shokapag|shokapag]] || [[word:kokapag|kokapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kapag|th忙kapag]] || [[word:j忙kapag|j忙kapag]] || [[word:sh忙kapag|sh忙kapag]] || [[word:k忙kapag|k忙kapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapag|thathakapag]] || [[word:jajakapag|jajakapag]] || [[word:shashakapag|shashakapag]] || [[word:kakakapag|kakakapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapag|thakapag]] || [[word:jakapag|jakapag]] || [[word:shakapag|shakapag]] || [[word:kakapag|kakapag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapag|thakapag]] || [[word:jakapag|jakapag]] || [[word:shakapag|shakapag]] || [[word:kakapag|kakapag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakapag|shakapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakapag|goshakapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakapag|gokishakapag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakapagn眉|shakapagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakapagnkn眉|goshakapagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapagn眉|gokishakapagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakapagsh毛|shakapagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakapagnksh毛|goshakapagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakapagsh毛|gokishakapagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapagro|shakapagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapagnkro|goshakapagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapagro|gokishakapagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapagmu|shakapagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapagnkmu|goshakapagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapagmu|gokishakapagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakapagsher|shakapagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakapagnksher|goshakapagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakapagsher|gokishakapagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakapagng|shakapagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakapagnkng|goshakapagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakapagng|gokishakapagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakapagya|shakapagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakapagnkya|goshakapagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakapagya|gokishakapagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakapagyam|shakapagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakapagnkyam|goshakapagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakapagyam|gokishakapagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapagn眉sh毛|shakapagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapagnkn眉sh毛|goshakapagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapagn眉sh毛|gokishakapagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapagn眉ro|shakapagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapagnkn眉ro|goshakapagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapagn眉ro|gokishakapagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapagn眉mu|shakapagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapagnkn眉mu|goshakapagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapagn眉mu|gokishakapagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapagsh毛n眉|shakapagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapagnksh毛n眉|goshakapagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapagsh毛n眉|gokishakapagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapagsh毛ro|shakapagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapagnksh毛ro|goshakapagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapagsh毛ro|gokishakapagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapagsh毛mu|shakapagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapagnksh毛mu|goshakapagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapagsh毛mu|gokishakapagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapagron眉|shakapagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapagnkron眉|goshakapagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapagron眉|gokishakapagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapagrosh毛|shakapagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapagnkrosh毛|goshakapagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapagrosh毛|gokishakapagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapagromu|shakapagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapagnkromu|goshakapagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapagromu|gokishakapagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapagmun眉|shakapagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapagnkmun眉|goshakapagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapagmun眉|gokishakapagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapagmush毛|shakapagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapagnkmush毛|goshakapagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapagmush毛|gokishakapagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapagmuro|shakapagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapagnkmuro|goshakapagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapagmuro|gokishakapagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
